name: smartpet-ble-android
description: Capacitor Android wrapper for the SmartPet BLE controller.

scripts.android:add: npm run build && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android && npm run android:patch-ble-permissions && npm run assets:generate
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run android:patch-ble-permissions
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:sync && npx cap run android
